title: 🌊The Wave's Wifi Tree  🌊
tagline: community wifi · please be mindful, it's shared
welcome_text: This is shared, free, community wifi. Enter a name and grow a 🌿 to get 3 hours of wood-bandwidth Wifi. Just come back here to get another 🌿.
footer:
Shared, fair, bandwidth-limited.
Be kind, keep it light.
